query: SELECT cardId, name, cardType, rarity, power, health, cost, characterClass, species, faction, era FROM cards WHERE cardType = 'character' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2T9erPMfbTpx4Y5.root --database 2quXz2C2n5hMfqc8hNVW3h --execute SELECT cardId, name, cardType, rarity, power, health, cost, characterClass, species, faction, era FROM cards WHERE cardType = 'character' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;
